items.title: Davood Mohajerani
items.text: HPC software engineer experienced in the design, implementation, and optimization of parallel algorithms on accelerators, GPUs (CUDA), and CPUs (Cilk/OpenMP), working at the intersection of AI inference acceleration, computer arithmetic, and parallel computing.

items.title: Slides
items.text:
• [Mar 2021] Ph.D. Thesis Presentation
  • [Nov 2019] Introduction to KLARAPTOR, IBM CASCON 2019 conference (software expo)
  • [Jul 2019] Big Prime Field FFT on Multi-core Processors, ISSAC 2019
  • [Oct 2018] "Big Prime Field FFTs on the GPU", IBM CASCON 2018 (the 13th Workshop on the Challenges for Parallel Computing)
  • [Jul 2017] Big Prime Field FFTs on the GPU, ISSAC 2017
  • [Jul 2017] CUMODP software demo slides, ISSAC 2017

items.title: Thesis
items.text:
• [Mar 2021] Ph.D. Thesis: Parallel arbitrary-precision integer arithmetic
  • [Dec 2016] M.Sc. Thesis: Computing FFTs over Large Prime Fields and their Implementation on GPUs

items.title: Blog
items.text:
DISCLAIMER

  • Opinions expressed on this blog are my own and do not reflect the ones of any employers in past, present, or future.

  • This is a TECHNICAL blog and I intend to keep it that way. My primary objective for writing this blog is to have a USEFUL collection of ideas and techniques related to software engineering, HPC, parallel algorithms, and low-level implementation.

  • I make no warranty and take no responsibility with the way this information is used.

items.title: Line breaks
items.text:

to create a line break.

Or use a blank line for a new paragraph.
